description: Reformat the Business Continuity Plan at '/home/ga/Documents/bcp_draft.docx' to resolve layout issues where wide tables are cut off. The 'Business Impact Analysis' and 'Appendix A: Emergency Contact Matrix' sections must be in landscape orientation, while all other narrative sections, such as the Cover/Executive Summary and Recovery Strategies, must remain in portrait orientation. Save the reformatted document to '/home/ga/Documents/bcp_formatted.docx' without overwriting the original draft.
